rationale: The cited paper appears only as part of a grouped citation used to support a broad claim that price promotions are common and effective for driving short-term demand/consideration. The citing paper does not engage this specific article's stockpiling decomposition framework, variables, or empirical results in its own model specification or hypothesis tests. Most of the methodological and interpretive grounding is tied to other promotion-modeling references, so this citation functions as general background support rather than a distinct building block.
